zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Powys於大約1134年出生時，她的父親King Madog of Powys44歲，母親Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales40歲。她於1163年與Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd在英國威爾斯安格萊阿福拉福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1189年5月12日在英國威爾斯安格萊阿福拉福享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Powys于大约1134年出生时，她的父亲King Madog of Powys44岁，母亲Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales40岁。她于1163年与Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd在英国威尔斯安格萊阿福拉福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1189年5月12日在英国威尔斯安格萊阿福拉福享年56岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: Powis
meanings: Welsh (now mainly West Midlands of England): habitational name from the region of Powis in mid Wales (from Old Welsh powes ‘country dwellers’).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Powys was born about 1134, her father, King Madog of Powys, was 44 and her mother, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, was 40. She married Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd in 1163, in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 12 May 1189, in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Powys est née environ 1134, son père, King Madog of Powys, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd en 1163, à Aberffraw, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1189, à Aberffraw, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Powys um 1134 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Madog of Powys 44 und ihre Mutter Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales 40. Sie hat 1163 in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1189 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Powys è nata il circa 1134, sua padre, King Madog of Powys, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd nel 1163, nel Aberffraw, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 maggio 1189, nel Aberffraw, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Powysが約1134年に生まれた時，父King Madog of Powysは44歳，母Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Walesは40歳であった。1163年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウでIorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwyneddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1189年5月12日にイギリスウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Powys(이)가 대략 1134년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Madog of Powys(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1163년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤에서 Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1189년 5월 12일 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Powys nasceu aproximadamente 1134, seu pai, King Madog of Powys, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd em 1163, em Aberffraw, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1189, em Aberffraw, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Powys родилась около 1134 г., её отцу по имени King Madog of Powys было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd в 1163 г. в местности абирффрав, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 12 мая 1189 г. в местности абирффрав, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Powys nació aproximadamente 1134, su papá, King Madog of Powys, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd en 1163, en Aberffraw, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1189, en Aberffraw, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
